RULING:
Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Motion is granted, except for $60 per pay period. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
